spec_match.rationale: The page now instantiates SpeechRecognition, sets processLocally=true, checks available()/install(), and streams interim/final results into the triage note.

interactive.rationale: The workflow has microphone start/stop controls, language-pack controls, workflow samples, textarea editing, and live local analysis.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Matches the parent blurb's sensitive-note triage workflow with local speech recognition, privacy status, and generated follow-up fields.

edge_cases.rationale: Handles missing SpeechRecognition, missing processLocally, unavailable/downloadable language packs, install failures, mic permission errors, audio capture errors, and offline status.

references.rationale: The see also section links to https://chromestatus.com/feature/6090916291674112 plus MDN and the Web Speech API specification.

design_system.rationale: Uses responsive panels, CSS variables, paired button background and color, and contained mono readouts without raw color literals.

summary: Rebuilt the triage workflow around real SpeechRecognition dictation with processLocally=true, local language-pack checks, live transcript analysis, failure handling, and required references.
